# Craft Public

Public Craft Agents documentation exposed over MCP for validator and local workflow smoke tests.

## Scope

- Search and read Craft Agents documentation content
- Use this source for deterministic read-only validation flows

## Guidelines

- Prefer read/search operations
- Do not assume write capability
- Keep responses brief in validator flows

## Examples

- Find a documentation page about workspace settings
- Search for Craft Agents source setup guidance
